hooks.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs');let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const i=JSON.parse(d);const p=i.tool_input?.file_path||'';if(/\.(md|txt)$/.test(p)){const n=p.split('/').pop();const allowed=/(README|CLAUDE|AGENTS|CONTRIBUTING|CHANGELOG|INSTALL|SECURITY|BACKLOG|SKILL|SPONSOR|ARCHITECTURE|AGENTS_OVERRIDE|configurationClaude|AGENTS\.override)\.md$/.test(n)||p.includes('/docs/private/')||p.includes('/skills/')||p.includes('/agents/')||p.includes('/commands/')||p.includes('/standards/');const forbidden=/(^temp|^final|_v[0-9]|^draft|^notes_|^archi_|^backup)/i.test(n);if(forbidden&&!allowed){console.error('[PHOENIX] BLOCKED: Random doc file detected: '+n);console.error('[PHOENIX] Allowed: README, CHANGELOG, SKILL, BACKLOG, INSTALL, SECURITY, AGENTS_OVERRIDE');console.error('[PHOENIX] Or place in /docs/private/ for temporary work');process.exit(2)}}}catch(e){}console.log(d)})"
hooks.description: Block creation of random .md files - Phoenix extended allowlist

hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const i=JSON.parse(d);const cmd=i.tool_input?.command||'';const devPattern=/(run (dev|start|serve)|webpack-dev-server|vite|next dev|nuxt dev|gatsby develop)/;if(process.platform!=='win32'&&!process.env.TMUX&&devPattern.test(cmd)){console.error('[PHOENIX] TIP: Dev servers run better in tmux (persistent logs):');console.error('[PHOENIX]   tmux new-session -d -s dev "'+cmd.trim().split('\n')[0]+'"');console.error('[PHOENIX] Not blocking - continuing anyway')}}catch(e){}console.log(d)})"
hooks.description: Soft tmux reminder for dev servers (non-blocking)
Save state snapshot before context compaction - prevents semantic loss
Load previous context, detect package manager, initialize session state
Suggest manual compaction every 50 edits to prevent context overflow
Auto-format JS/TS files with Prettier after edits
Warn about console.log statements after edits
Check for debug console.log in modified files at end of each response
